nodes.statement: sigma(A_{N,c}) approximates sigma(K_c) in the bulk (Theorem A of Paper XXI)
D_Edge != 0: at least one positive eigenvalue (Theorem B of Paper XXI)
Gram coercivity implies spectral gap >= C c^{-1/2} (Paper 13b Theorem A)
K_c(x,y) = sin(c(x-y)) / (pi(x-y)): sinc kernel (Slepian 1978)
Widom edge phase phi_c and O(c) growth (Widom 1964)
Deift-Zhou steepest descent framework (Deift 1999)
Fredholm determinant continuity in S1-norm (standard)
Tracy-Widom: det(I - K^Airy) = F_TW(0) ~ 0.9597; ||K^Airy|| <= 1 - F_TW(0)
Montgomery-Vaughan mean square: int_0^1 |sum_p e(p*theta) - H/log X|^2 dtheta << H*loglog(X)/log(X)
Operator setup: D_Edge as mismatch form, Bulk vs Edge regimes
Exact IIKS identity: K_c(x,y) = F_c(x)^T J G_c(y) / (x-y)
The cubic Airy term 1/3 u^3 requires integration of the Widom edge phase via IIKS RHP structure
Edge stability decomposes as: (nonlinear phase consistency) + (linear kernel transfer)
Assumption A: exists g_c analytic satisfying 2 Re(g_c^+) = Re(phi_c) with g_c(z) = log z + O(z^{-1})
Nonlinearity of Assumption A: no RMT-type candidate satisfies (A) for large c
Assumption B: given A, steepest-descent geometry holds
Conjecture 3.3: Y_c -> Y_Airy; implies ||K_c^tilde - K^Airy||_{S1} = O(c^{-1/3})
Reduction: uniform edge-frame stability => lambda_min(G_{N,c}) >= alpha(c) ~ c^{-1/2}
Reduction functor: lambda_min(G_{N,c}) >= c^{-1/2} => gap >= C c^{-1/2}
Conditional Airy-scale upgrade: under Conjecture 3.3, gap upgrades to c^{-1/3}
D^Airy = Pi_Airy (A^arith - K^Airy) Pi_Airy: Rand-Weyl operator definition
inf sigma(D^Airy) >= c2^Airy > 0 [CLOSED via O5-gap-persistence + MV]
nodes.notes: Previously Conjecture 5.2. Now Theorem via gap-persistence. Unconditional for c >= c_0.

nodes.statement: Main Theorem: inf_{f in Edge} <D_Edge f,f> >= c2^Airy / 2 > 0
nodes.notes: Terminal node. O4 (discrete) via P9->R1; O5 (spectral) via P12. Both arms closed.

nodes.statement: Prove Assumption A: exists g_c satisfying the nonlinear matching condition
nodes.mechanism: Fixed-point T_c(g) = H_{(-1,1)}[1/2 Re(phi_c[g])] + log; prove contractive via Muskhelishvili.

nodes.statement: Prove Assumption B given A: steepest-descent geometry holds
nodes.mechanism: Deift-Zhou: sign check Re(2g_c - phi_c), Lipschitz contour parameterisation.

nodes.statement: Uniform BW-Doubling: inf_{n in [(1-delta)N,N)} E_out(|psi_n|^2) >= c3 > 0
nodes.mechanism: Uniform Schur-test on edge block; or Kadec-1/4 for prime frequencies.

nodes.statement: Uniform quasi-isometry of Ev|_Edge: A||f||^2 <= ||Ev f||^2 <= B||f||^2, A>0 uniform in N [ANALYTICALLY REDUCED]
nodes.notes: Reduced to T2 triple-scaling consistency (bookkeeping) + T3 finite-k completion. Both standard FA. Feeds O5-B-2.2 via shared off-diagonal constant C.

nodes.statement: inf sigma(D^Airy) >= c2^Airy > 0 [CLOSING REGIME: gap-persistence via MV]
nodes.notes: Reframed: not scratch-positivity but gap-persistence. delta_Airy >= 0.96 (TW), ||E_c|| -> 0 (MV unconditional). Proof complete modulo V1-V4 bookkeeping.

nodes.statement: ||K^Airy||_op <= 1 - F_TW(0) ~ 0.04; delta_Airy = 1 - ||K^Airy|| >= 0.96
nodes.notes: COMPLETE. Direct import from TW theory.

nodes.statement: ||E_c||_op <= C*(loglog(c)/log(c))^{1/2} -> 0 unconditionally
nodes.notes: Proof complete modulo V1-V4 (Fourier expansion fill-in, Bernstein inequality, explicit constant, numerical verification). All LOW difficulty.

nodes.statement: Off-diagonal decay |H_{kl}| <= C/|k-l|^{3/2} in Airy eigenfunction basis
nodes.notes: Imports O4-B-2 off-diagonal decay via basis change. Provides alternative (Jaffard) route to O5 independent of MV.

nodes.statement: Under RH: characterise RH-collapse of the coercivity gap
nodes.mechanism: sigma(D^Airy) controlled by zero distribution of zeta(s).
